## Architecture (target — reference: `ARCHITECTURE.md`)

```
html-prototype/
├── (top-level entry pages — thin shells, ≤50KB each)
│   ├── index.html, profile.html, family.html, network.html, ...
│   └── record.html (planned: GENERIC for family/network/pet, replacing 3 duplicates)
├── partials/                  ← reusable fragments, load via loadPartial(name, target)
├── _modals/                   ← (planned) lazy-loaded modals
├── _data/                     ← (planned) peopleStore.js, plansStore.js, etc.
├── _versions/                 ← auto rolling backups + daily snapshots + scripts
├── _shared.css, _shared.js    ← shared infrastructure
├── img/, icons/, fonts/
└── print/                     ← print pages (already split ✅)
```

---

## Useful commands

```bash
# Find any file by name
find html-prototype -name "*.html" | grep -i <keyword>

# Restore a file from backup
html-prototype/_versions/scripts/restore.sh --list <filename>
html-prototype/_versions/scripts/restore.sh <filename> daily 2026-04-28

# Daily health check
html-prototype/_versions/scripts/health-check.sh

# Manually update this map
html-prototype/_versions/scripts/update-map.sh
```
